parameters.subject: ⚠️ SECURITY NOTICE: An unsafe email has been moved to your Bin
parameters.message:
=

🛡️ Automated Enterprise Security Notification

Attention Team Member,

To safeguard corporate data assets, our automated SecOps pipeline continuously monitors incoming traffic. This notice is to inform you that an inbound message has been flagged as a critical security risk and automatically moved to your Bin/Trash folder.

🔍 Why was this action taken?

Our endpoint reputation databases scanned the contents of the email and detected links or attachments that are known phishing vectors or contain suspicious tracking logic.

📋 Intercepted Message Metadata:

  • Sender: {{ $node["Extract Links & Attachments1"].json.original_sender }}
  • Subject Line: {{ $node["Extract Links & Attachments1"].json.original_subject }}
  • Flagged Threat Object: {{ $node["Extract Links & Attachments1"].json.extracted_urls }}

💡 Cyber Security Education & Awareness:

Attackers frequently spoof trusted applications like Adobe Sign, DocuSign, or shipping services. They include links embedded inside PDF attachments to bypass standard email text filters.

While the email layout may have appeared completely legitimate, interacting with the links inside it would have exposed your system credentials to external credential harvesting or malware execution.

No further action is required on your part. The threat has been completely neutralized. If you believe this file was filtered in error and is a business requirement, please open an administrative ticket with the IT Helpdesk referencing Incident ID: n8n-SOAR-SEC.

This is an automated operational system message from the Enterprise Information Security Gateway.
